name: qa
description: Implementation with commit post-action -> QA review -> PR flow with automatic revision requests for weak testing

post_action.name: commit
post_action.description: Implementation agent commits the relevant work before review
post_action.prompt: Commit the relevant work for this task before QA review. Original task: $TASK_PROMPT

stages.name: review
stages.description: QA agent checks whether sufficient tests exist before PR creation
stages.prompt: Review branch $BRANCH for task quality and test coverage against base $BASE_REF. Original task: $TASK_PROMPT. Previous result: $PREV_RESULT

stages.name: pr
stages.description: Agent creates a GitHub PR after QA passes
stages.prompt: Create a PR for the QA-approved work on branch $BRANCH. QA result: $PREV_RESULT
